## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss upcoming events, presentation preparation, and brand/design updates for growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/cT1deSMEgKus_A4fNpxmsSDuiTMSAMhx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel preparing for a workshop presentation to 1000+ attendees; Renato to assist with slide design](https://fathom.video/share/cT1deSMEgKus_A4fNpxmsSDuiTMSAMhx?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Planning for October events: SEMrush conference (Oct 29) in Amsterdam and potential growthx.ai networking event](https://fathom.video/share/cT1deSMEgKus_A4fNpxmsSDuiTMSAMhx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Initiating brand refresh and design system update for growthx.ai, including website and presentation materials](https://fathom.video/share/cT1deSMEgKus_A4fNpxmsSDuiTMSAMhx?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Considering bringing in a senior graphic designer for short-term project support](https://fathom.video/share/cT1deSMEgKus_A4fNpxmsSDuiTMSAMhx?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

## Topics

### Upcoming Workshop and Presentation

  - [Marcel working on content with single-statement slides, illustrations, and examples](https://fathom.video/share/cT1deSMEgKus_A4fNpxmsSDuiTMSAMhx?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
